zh.lifeSummary: 當Mary Langton於1679年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加北卡羅來納州博福特巴斯時，她的父親Nelson Langton25歲，母親Mrs Nelson Langston25歲。她於1699年與Robert Peyton在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州格盧斯特結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1733年1月8日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加北卡羅來納州博福特享年54歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mary Langton于1679年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加北卡罗来纳州博福特巴斯时，她的父亲Nelson Langton25岁，母亲Mrs Nelson Langston25岁。她于1699年与Robert Peyton在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州格盧斯特结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1733年1月8日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加北卡罗来纳州博福特享年54岁。

nameMeanings.name: Langton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from one or more of the many places called with Old English lang ‘long’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’, such as Langton Hall in Kirkby in Ashfield (Nottinghamshire), Langton Lodge in Hendon (Middlesex), Langton (Yorkshire), East and West Langton (Leicestershire), Langton by Horncastle, Langton by Spilsby, and Langton by Wragby (all in Lincolnshire), and Lanton (Northumb). Compare Lankton , Lanton , and Longton .

variants.name: Lankton
meanings: History: Thomas Lankton, born c. 1714 in Hartford County, CT, died 1783 in Litchfield County, CT, was a son of Joseph Langton.

variants.name: Longton
meanings: habitational name from Longton in Lancashire. The placename derives from Old English lang ‘long’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

nameMeanings.name: Mary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Moira
meanings: Anglicized form of Irish Máire , now used throughout the English-speaking world.

historicEvents.title: The Tuscarora War
historicEvents.description: The British, Dutch, and German settlers fought with the Tuscarora Native Americans, from September 22, 1711- February 11, 1715, in North Carolina.
North Carolina is the location of Cape Hatteras, sometimes called the Graveyard of the Atlantic- many shipwrecks have occurred nearby.

historicEvents.title: Becomes a Royal Colony
historicEvents.description: July 25, 1729, North Carolina became a royal colony, when the colony was sold to King George II.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Anchor-Carolina Becomes North and South Carolina

en.lifeSummary: When Mary Langton was born in 1679, in Bath, Beaufort, North Carolina, British Colonial America, her father, Nelson Langton, was 25 and her mother, Mrs Nelson Langston, was 25. She married Robert Peyton in 1699, in Gloucester, Virginia, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 8 January 1733, in Beaufort, North Carolina, British Colonial America, at the age of 54.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mary Langton est née en 1679, à Bath, Beaufort, Caroline du Nord, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, Nelson Langton, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Mrs Nelson Langston, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé Robert Peyton en 1699, à Gloucester, Virginie, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 8 janvier 1733, à Beaufort, Caroline du Nord, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 54 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mary Langton 1679 in Bath, Beaufort, North Carolina, British Colonial America geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Nelson Langton 25 und ihre Mutter Mrs Nelson Langston 25. Sie hat 1699 in Gloucester, Virginia, British Colonial America Robert Peyton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 8. Januar 1733 im Alter von 54 Jahren in Beaufort, North Carolina, British Colonial America.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Langton è nata il nel 1679 nel Bath, Beaufort, Carolina del Nord, British Colonial America, sua padre, Nelson Langton, aveva 25 anni e sua madre, Mrs Nelson Langston, aveva 25 anni. Lei sposato Robert Peyton nel 1699, nel Gloucester, Virginia, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 8 gennaio 1733, nel Beaufort, Carolina del Nord, British Colonial America, all'età di 54 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Mary Langtonが1679年にイギリス植民地アメリカノースカロライナ州ビーウフォートバスで生まれた時，父Nelson Langtonは25歳，母Mrs Nelson Langstonは25歳であった。1699年にイギリス植民地アメリカバージニア州グロウセスターでRobert Peytonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1733年1月8日にイギリス植民地アメリカノースカロライナ州ビーウフォートで54歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Mary Langton(이)가 1679년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 노스캐롤라이나 주 보포트 바스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Nelson Langton(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mrs Nelson Langston(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 1699년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 그루스스터에서 Robert Peyton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1733년 1월 8일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 노스캐롤라이나 주 보포트에서 54세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Langton nasceu em 1679, em Bath, Beaufort, Carolina do Norte, British Colonial America, seu pai, Nelson Langton, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Mrs Nelson Langston, tinha 25 anos. Ela casou-se com Robert Peyton em 1699, em Gloucester, Virginia, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 8 de janeiro de 1733, em Beaufort, Carolina do Norte, British Colonial America, com 54 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mary Langton родилась в 1679 г. в местности бат, бофорт, Северная Каролина, бритиш колоняль амирика, её отцу по имени Nelson Langton было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs Nelson Langston, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert Peyton в 1699 г. в местности глоусестир, Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 4 дочери. Она умерла 8 января 1733 г. в местности бофорт, Северная Каролина, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 54 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mary Langton nació en 1679, en Bath, Beaufort, Carolina del Norte, British Colonial America, su papá, Nelson Langton, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Mrs Nelson Langston, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Robert Peyton en 1699, en Gloucester, Virginia, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 8 de enero de 1733, en Beaufort, Carolina del Norte, British Colonial America, a la edad de 54 años.
